001package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter;
002
003import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.RPM;
004import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Seconds;
005
006import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
007import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
008
009import dev.doglog.DogLog;
010import edu.wpi.first.math.filter.Debouncer;
011import edu.wpi.first.math.filter.LinearFilter;
012import edu.wpi.first.math.filter.Debouncer.DebounceType;
013import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
014
015public class ShooterFirstShotIncrease extends Command {
016    private final Shooter shooter;
017    private final LinearFilter currentFilter;
018    private final Debouncer shotFinished;
019    private double previousCurrent;
020
021    public ShooterFirstShotIncrease() {
022        shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
023        currentFilter = LinearFilter.singlePoleIIR(0.1, Settings.DT.in(Seconds));
024        shotFinished = new Debouncer(Settings.Shooter.FIRST_SHOT_DEBOUNCE.in(Seconds), DebounceType.kRising);
025        previousCurrent = 0;
026    }
027
028    @Override
029    public void initialize() {
030        shooter.addToBonusVelocity(Settings.Shooter.FIRST_SHOT_BONUS.get());
031        shooter.setGainSlot(1);
032    }
033
034    private boolean currentDecreasing() {
035        final double rawCurrent = Shooter.getInstance().getCurrentAngularVelocity().in(RPM);
036        final double filteredCurrent = currentFilter.calculate(rawCurrent);
037
038        final boolean decreasing = filteredCurrent < this.previousCurrent;
039
040        this.previousCurrent = filteredCurrent;
041
042        DogLog.log("Shooter/First Shot/Raw Current", rawCurrent);
043        DogLog.log("Shooter/First Shot/Filtered Current", filteredCurrent);
044        DogLog.log("Shooter/First Shot/Is Decreasing", decreasing);
045
046        return decreasing;
047    }
048
049    @Override
050    public boolean isFinished() {
051        return shotFinished.calculate(this.currentDecreasing());
052    }
053
054    @Override
055    public void end(boolean interrupted) {
056        shooter.resetBonusVelocity();
057        shooter.setGainSlot(0);
058    }
059}
